scenes.title: Millhaven
scenes.biggestGap: The village texture is strong, but several beats still rely on generic house-search language instead of Lordaeron-specific infrastructure and Sylvanas-specific field read.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Bind the sweep to Millhaven's river bend, mill lane, granary, garden plots, and road cut instead of generic village emptiness.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Keep hands on latch iron, flour sacks, packed mud, snapped crust, scummed trough water, and stove plates.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads silence, lines of approach, spoor geometry, and whether Jaina's magic changes the field picture.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Any exchange in the houses or granary needs a nearby threshold, horse, sack, or bit of ground doing tactical work.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The missing dead must end world-bound in churned mud and north-running tracks, not abstract dread.

scenes.title: The Survivor and the Proof
scenes.biggestGap: The rescue and testimony work, but the dialogue needs more environmental embodiment so the cellar and road cut stay active while the child speaks.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Keep the rescue pinned to the cellar mouth, cramped stone steps, then the marked road cut north of the village.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Use damp stone, cloak wool, waterskin leather, blanket cloth, mud crust, and road markers to stop the testimony from floating.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas stays in command radius, reading what steadies Miri, what Jaina can prove, and when witness plus spoor become actionable.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Break the testimony with Miri's grip, Neral's crouch, Jaina's lowered staff, and Sylvanas's ground read.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Scene ends with north-northeast physically proven in the road cut and converted into a dispatch decision.

scenes.title: The Grain Seller on the Road
scenes.biggestGap: The chapter's last movement risks flattening into logistics unless the dispatch, trader exchange, and southbound departure stay physically tied to road gear, horseflesh, wagon texture, and the reduced escort.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Keep the action on the village well, the north bend, the wagon lane, and the road south flattening into farmland.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Use wax, steel nib, dispatch tube, saddle leather, wagon chaff, and grain dust to carry the sequence.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas measures the cost of losing riders, the usefulness of strangers, and the tactical value of Jaina's read without warming emotionally.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Every road exchange needs a horse, saddle, wagon, or piece of gear bearing pressure.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The final beat must leave the reduced four-rider party physically aimed south through Lordaeron, with Millhaven and its granary still behind them.
